---
title: "Blog"
listing:
  - id: dp-series
    contents: "posts/*/index.qmd"
    sort: "date asc"
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 2
    categories: true
    fields: [title, subtitle, date, categories, reading-time]
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---

## Differential Privacy

A series building intuition from gradients through memorization to cutting-edge privacy mechanisms.

::: {#dp-series}
:::
